## Checklist

- [ ] I removed or masked tokens, cookies, callback URLs and device identifiers
- [ ] I did not attach raw `data/` exports or local profile files
- [ ] I verified the problem can be described without sensitive account data

Describe the problem briefly.

## Logs or Screenshots

Only provide redacted logs or privacy-safe screenshots.

Do not include:

- access tokens
- refresh tokens
- cookies
- full callback URLs
- account exports
- personal email addresses
